title: speedometer.mc
description: extremely fast and optimised minecraft pack thats blows other optimisation packs out of the water
body:
speedometer is an extremely fast and optimised minecraft pack thats blows other optimisation packs out of the water. it is based on vulkanmod so it might not be stable on some pcs. not tested so far on anything other than windows with an old nvidia gpu and old intel cpu.

***shredding max render distance on old nvidia gpu and intel cpu***
![shredding max render distance on old nvidia gpu and intel cpu](https://i.imgur.com/LzMv1fi.png)
